description_long: This is a vintage-style kettle made primarily of copper, featuring a wide, rounded body with a slightly flared base. The surface has a hammered texture and a warm, reddish-brown metallic sheen, with subtle engraved motifs visible on the body and base. A large, arched handle is attached to one side, crafted from the same copper material and shaped into a loop for easy gripping. The top of the kettle is open, with no visible lid, and the rim is gently scalloped, adding to its decorative appeal. The spout is short and integrated into the body, blending smoothly with the overall form. This kettle exudes an antique, handcrafted aesthetic, suitable for display or functional use in an urban or rustic setting.
description: A hammered copper kettle with a wide, flared base, engraved motifs, an arched loop handle, and an open scalloped rim. The surface is glossy and richly colored, evoking a vintage, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: The front view shows the scalloped open rim, engraved motifs on the body, and the prominent arched handle on the right.
description_view_1: The rear view centers the handle, showing its full looped shape and the hammered copper texture on the back.
description_view_2: The left side view highlights the handle's attachment and the engraved motifs on the base, with the open rim visible.
description_view_3: The front view with the handle centered at the top, showing the engraved motif on the base and the kettle's rounded, flared shape.
